case_title: JONATHAN VLOCK VS. YOKO FUJI HERNANDEZ

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-15-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-15-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF JONATHAN VLOCK IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT YOKO FUJI HERNANDEZ IS PRESENT VIA COURT CALL. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
